    final class 
    JetCheckArgumentsGenerator
    Generates one trial's arguments by running the per-parameter jetCheck generators against the engine's guided byte stream.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Object[]
    JUnit5FuzzRunner.decode(ArgumentsGenerator generator, InputStream input)
    Decodes one input into the arguments for a single trial.
    static FuzzResult
    JUnit5FuzzRunner.fuzz(Class<?> testClass, Method method, Guidance guidance, ArgumentsGenerator arguments)
    Runs a full fuzzing campaign for a fuzz-test method under the given guidance.
